examples: Oryx is a Dallas-based oil and gas exploration and production concern.
An oryx cruised doggedly toward a water hole at a nearby tourist camp.
Orry, a Qatari oryx , is the Official Mascot of the Doha Asian Games 2006.
Like Addax, Oryx will be focused on exploring for oil in west Africa and Iraqi Kurdistan.
In 2002, a lioness at Samburu National Park adopted a succession of baby oryx.
